stemHtml: A helicopter diverts from the destination aerodrome to the alternate aerodrome and on arrival is instructed to hold by the ATC. The speed is reduced to V minimum power (Vmp) and the fuel flow equals 1290 kg/h. The helicopter must be on the ground at the alternate aerodrome with 30 minutes of Final Reserve Fuel remaining (based on the fuel flow at Vmp). Assuming that the remaining usable fuel is 1640 kg, the remaining safe endurance/flight time is…
